blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 5 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of 'Pause without losing slot'.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of 'Pause without losing slot'.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Pause without losing slot', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this requirement. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a customer can pause for a vacation month without losing their preferred time permanently, there is no concrete evidence or API reads that confirm this behavior has been implemented or validated. Therefore, the validation step is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence.
